title: Touchup pull manpage
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Touch up the buildah pull man page to remove the from scratch from the title.

comments.body: @rhatdan this is another PR that should be in v1.4 but Red Hat CI is faling here too with unrelated issues.  Is there someone we can ping about Red Hat CI, looks like most of are PRs are hung up there.

LGTM
@TomSweeneyRedHat if it's urgent, I guess we can merge it manually.
